subcodes.title: Letter to the uncle of the Báb in Bushihr
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down verses upon whomsoever He willeth among His servants, and verily He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing. And this, truly, is a decree from His presence, that I should send forth a Book containing ordinances for mankind according to which they act [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. سبحان الذی قد نزل الآیات علی من یشاء من عباده و انه لسمیع علیم و ان ذلک حکم من لدی ان ارسل کتاباً فیه احکام الناس ما هم کانوا عاملین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @belief and denial
